Errors due to statistics, geometry, counting

The total error of the flux measurement was
about 4.5% which essentially comprises of the errors
in the counting efficiency of the stilbene crystal,
in the energy calibration curve for protons in stilbene
and in the estimation of edge-effects and multiple n-p
